title: Instrumentation Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger instrumentation design foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Instrumentation Design Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Instrumentation Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good instrumentation design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Instrumentation Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
